items.text: B&M extracted 25 corporate residency visas in record time. Communication in both English and Arabic was exceptional. License credentials were transparent from day one.

items.text: We rely on B&M for all our Daman health insurance renewals. Their VIP desk handles everything within hours. Highly professional team.

items.text: Resolving traffic clearances and court filings under Abu Dhabi traffic law is complex. B&M cleared all files transparently. Excellent support.

items.text: The Saudi Arabia business visa was processed in 3 days. Extremely smooth process, very responsive team. Will use B&M for all future transactions.

about.heading: About B&M – Brand & More
about.subheading: Your licensed government liaison across Abu Dhabi and Dubai since incorporation.
about.body1: B&M – Brand & More Transaction Following (License CN-3734050) is a government-registered company operating across Abu Dhabi and Dubai. We provide clear, legal, and rapid transactional support to corporate entities and individuals navigating the administrative landscape of the GCC.
about.body2: By maintaining direct connections with government departments — ICP, GDRFA, Abu Dhabi Police, Amer Dubai, DOH/Daman, and the Judicial Department — we reduce bottlenecks and ensure all transactions conclude with full legal integrity.
about.issued: Issued by: Abu Dhabi Department of Economic Development
